title: Aureline scaffold-plan record
description: Seed schema for the scaffold preflight / generator review sheet every starter / scaffold surface, command-palette generator row, generator-preview sheet, AI-assisted generation path, extension-provided generator, and CLI / headless creation path reads when it discloses, **before any file is written**, **what target the scaffold writes to**, **which resolved parameter sources it used**, **what file / directory impact it has**, **what dependency / package / task plan it carries**, **which remote / bootstrap implications and hook / network / registry / remote-image / dependency side effects it declares**, and **which create-empty / set-up-later / rollback handoff paths it exposes**. One plan per scaffold attempt; the plan references its descriptor by id and never re-derives provenance. Raw absolute paths, raw credentials, raw remote URLs, raw template bytes, and raw generated file content never appear; only opaque refs and typed labels cross the boundary. No claimed scaffold flow writes files before the user can review this plan or its exported preflight summary. AI-assisted and extension-provided generation reuse this same plan and the same diff-review surface; they cannot invent undeclared hooks, hidden bootstrap steps, or IDE-only authority. Adding a new generation_verb, scaffold_scope_class, parameter_source_class, dependency_action_class, scaffold_task_execution_class, remote_implication_class, scaffold_side_effect_class, setup_choice_class, or rollback_boundary_class is additive-minor and bumps scaffold_plan_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking. Companion contracts: /schemas/workspace/template_generator_descriptor.schema.json (the descriptor the plan scaffolds from) and /schemas/workspace/scaffold_run.schema.json (the run record the plan produces).

scaffold_plan_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the scaffold-plan payload shape. Bumped only on breaking payload changes.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in support bundles and claim manifests. Raw absolute paths, raw credentials, raw URLs, and raw bytes never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: Producer-local monotonic timestamp. Opaque to this schema.

redaction_aware_text.description: Redaction-aware free text (<= 1024 graphemes). The exporter applies the redaction policy before the value crosses the boundary.

fixture_metadata.description: Optional worked-example prelude carried on fixtures. Ignored by the boundary contract.

generation_verb.description: Closed generation-verb set. Create-project, generate-into-existing, and update-regenerate stay distinct verbs with distinct review semantics; the plan never collapses one into another.

parameter_source_class.description: Closed parameter-source set. Names where a resolved parameter value came from so the review sheet shows resolved parameter sources, not just values.

dependency_action_class.description: Closed dependency-action set. 'restore_now' / 'restore_deferred' reach a registry / network and must be declared as a dependency side effect.

remote_implication_class.description: Closed remote / bootstrap implication set. Each implication is declared before execution.

scaffold_side_effect_class.description: Closed side-effect set: the five families the spec requires to be declared before execution and to remain attributable after failure or rollback.

setup_choice_class.description: Closed setup-choice set. The explicit create-empty / set-up-later / full-scaffold handoff choices the plan exposes where the source artifact supports them.

rollback_boundary_class.description: Closed rollback-boundary set. 'manual_only' MUST carry a checkpoint_ref or a presentation label naming the manual path; the others are automatic.

scaffold_target.description: Typed scaffold target. Carries an opaque path ref, never a raw path. 'into_existing' is true when the target already contains workspace content the plan will write alongside or modify.

resolved_parameter.description: One resolved parameter. Names the parameter and the source it was resolved from; the value_label is redaction-aware.

file_impact_summary.description: File / directory impact summary the preflight discloses before any write.

dependency_plan_entry.description: One dependency-plan entry. Names the package action and its registry class without raw commands or URLs.

task_plan_entry.description: One planned setup / validation task. A task with declared_in_descriptor true MUST correspond to a declared hook / validation task on the descriptor; a planned-as-declared task with no descriptor entry is rejected at projection time.

remote_implication.description: One remote / bootstrap implication. A plan with an undeclared implication is non-conforming.

side_effect_declaration.description: One side-effect declaration. Every hook / network / registry / remote-image / dependency side effect MUST be declared before execution and remain attributable after failure or rollback.

rollback_boundary.description: Typed rollback boundary the plan plants before any write. Names the rollback / delete-generated-files / git-initial-commit / manual path.

scaffold_review_state.description: Review-state block. 'no_writes_before_review' MUST be true on a conforming claimed beta plan; 'preflight_export_available' enables the exported preflight summary.

scaffold_plan_record.description: One scaffold-plan record. Emitted by every surface that previews a scaffold / generation before commit. Surfaces read the record by id; they do not re-derive impact or side effects.
